message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracking state

Updates .beads/issues.jsonl with current issue states from the local
bd database. This sync includes:

- Status updates for completed features
- Priority adjustments based on current work
- Dependency tracking updates
- Timestamp synchronization

The beads JSONL is the authoritative source for issue state and is
committed alongside code changes per project conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
